name: Honey-Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake in an oblong baking pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches) according to the package directions.
2. While the cake is baking, heat the wine, sugar, honey, cinnamon sticks, and cloves in a saucepan over medium heat until boiling. Stir constantly. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Allow the cake to cool for 5 minutes. Cut into serving-size pieces.
4. Remove the cinnamon sticks and cloves from the syrup.
5. Pour the syrup slowly over the cake in the pan.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. In a chilled small bowl, beat the whipping cream and honey with a mixer until stiff. Fold in the yogurt. Chill until ready to serve.
8. Serve the cake topped with the yogurt mixture and garnished with almonds.
